name: Heat-Shrink Solder Seal Butt Connectors (1000pc Kit, HXT-11/21/31/41)

specs._raw_color_codes: white 26-24 AWG, red 22-18 AWG, blue 16-14 AWG, yellow 12-10 AWG
specs._raw_use: waterproof butt splice for marine, automotive, outdoor wiring
specs._raw_application: permanent waterproof inline wire-to-wire splice; heat with hot-air gun until solder ring flows and shrink sleeve seals

description: Single-use heat-shrink solder-seal butt splice. Pre-loaded low-temp solder ring (melts ~138°C) sits between two adhesive-lined polyolefin sleeves; one shot from a heat gun melts the solder onto stripped wire ends and shrinks the sleeve to a waterproof, insulated, vibration-resistant joint. Color codes the AWG range (white 26-24, red 22-18, blue 16-14, yellow 12-10). Kit ships in a sorted 4-tray clear case totaling 1000 pieces.
packageContents: 1x clear plastic storage case with 4 compartments

source.sellerTitle: 50-1000pcs Heat Shrink Solder Seal Wire Connectors Kit Waterproof Butt Electrical Terminals Insulated Splice Marine Automotive
